title: Student Advisor Relationships
description: Information about the relationship between a student and an advisor.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student advisor relationship.

advisor.title: Advisor
advisor.description: The person who provides guidance to the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Advisor.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student receiving guidance from the advisor.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

advisorType.title: Advisor Type
advisorType.description: The type of advisor. (E.g. concentration, major, peer, thesis, etc.)

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Advisor Type.

program.title: Program
program.description: The program for which the student is receiving guidance for from the advisor.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Program.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The date when the student was first assigned to the advisor.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The last date when the student was associated with the advisor.

assignedPriority.title: Assigned Priority
assignedPriority.description: The prioritization (e.g. primary) of the advisor as the source of guidance for the student.

startAcademicPeriod.title: Start Academic Period
startAcademicPeriod.description: The academic period when the advisor first provided guidance to the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Start Academic Period.
